title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo, Marines, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #18 as robin and Usopp encounter the Tontatta people while Law’s meeting with Doflamingo and Fujitora becomes increasingly dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Damn you law ...I won't forget this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just fly us to the island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Bugo- Gogo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Easy for you to say!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: How much gas energy do you think it takes to carry three people!! I'm supposed to be your delicate hostage!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: pant pant...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We're... here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: where weeze

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The water's full of shipwrecks... courtesy of the battle fish no doubt...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No one's here yet, it seems...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The track marks from the fish being dragged...end right here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What could that have been...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Holy crap...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Talk about a wild forest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: uninhabited forest north of dressrosa "GREEN BIT!"

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Hey Joker !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's me! We're ready to make the exchange !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: So-so this is green bit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What's with these giant plants...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There's the South Eastern Beach we arranged to meet at.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll let you go, as promised, at three o'clock.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "I suppose I'll

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey!! Over there!! On the other side!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: That's a marine warship right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: It smashed into the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: It's safe to say that thing didn't just wash ashore!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: What the hell could've happened ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: The damage to the plants is still relatively recent.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It appears that vessel landed there recently...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The ship itself isn't as damaged as you'd think.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It came through that school of Battle Fish...?!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Then it's only a matter of time before the Marines get here too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Eh......? damn, we've been made?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Shut up! You're too loud!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I didn't hear any- thing about this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: In case you've forgotten, I've got a bounty on my head!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Now that my boss jokes has stepped down from the shichi- Bukai, I don't have any legal protection anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: If you release me onto this marine infested island cuffed, then I'll...!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: But isn't joker just a pirate too now?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's not a nice look that you've got one your face right now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Of course.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Why else would I make the Marines move...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm heading over to green bit...

summary: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
